title: Cobblemon:Create Realm
description: A Coblemon and create modpack with randomizer spawns chances
body:
Cobblemon:Create Realm is where Pokémon meets engineering and adventure!
Step into a world where Cobblemon brings your favorite creatures to life, while the Create mod and its addons let you design sprawling automated bases, intricate farms, and immersive contraptions.

⚙️ Key Features:

Cobblemon Integration – Catch, train, and battle Pokémon in a seamless Minecraft world wher random spawns was added
Create & Addons – Build advanced machines, railways, and automated systems to power your Pokémon journey.

Exploration & Adventure – Enhanced biomes, structures, and dungeons to explore while hunting for rare Pokémon.

Balanced Gameplay – A smooth blend of technology, survival, and adventure that keeps every playthrough fresh.

Perfect for builders, tinkerers, and Pokémon trainers alike, this modpack turns Minecraft into a living, evolving realm of creativity and adventure.
